viewer.header: Refresh / Swap / Full file / Ignore whitespace / Ignore case
viewer.footer: Rows keep punctuation-heavy labels for token-level diff checks.

notes: Tokens include brackets, commas, colons, slashes, and quoted values.
The right-side variant changes punctuation placement and several string values.
This makes inline highlighting exercise non-word token boundaries carefully.
The payload is deliberately large enough to clear the fixture minimum size.

report.summary: Baseline punctuation map for inline diff tokenization.

notes: The appendix extends the JSON fixture beyond the repository minimum size.
It also gives the token highlighter extra commas, braces, and quoted strings.
Each sentence is intentionally plain ASCII to keep the file portable.
The right-side variant changes several separators and wording choices.
tail: extra punctuation, commas, and quoted strings keep the fixture larger.
the compare should still emphasize changed separators and token order.
